programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A Pulp Fiction-inspired trip through Springfield, containing 22 vignettes about the town's residents, including the sad tale of how Moe was robbed, what happened when Lisa got gum in her hair and the day Smithers was stung by a bee

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The death of Grampa's old army friend reveals the whereabouts of priceless pictures looted during the Second World War, and Bart is asked to help recover the collection before Mr Burns gets his hands on it

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart joins forces with Donny, a new pupil at Springfield Elementary School who has a penchant for trouble-making - only to discover he is actually a spy acting on behalf of Principal Skinner. With the guest voice of Topher Grace (That '70s Show)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa play an ill-advised cliff-top prank that leaves them convinced they have killed Martin. Meanwhile, Marge hires a TV crew to keep a constant watch over Homer so that she can be sure he is sticking to his diet

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes in depressed country singer Lurleen Lumpkin, who is on the run from the Springfield authorities for not paying her taxes. With the guest voices of Beverly D'Angelo and the Dixie Chicks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart joins the 4-H youth movement and saves the life of a sickly calf, but makes the mistake of giving it to a farm girl named Mary. Unfortunately, her father Cletus thinks it constitutes a marriage proposal, and starts making hurried arrangements. With the voice of Zooey Deschanel

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa makes a revealing documentary about life with her family for a school project. However, after it receives praise at the Sundance Film Festival, the Simpsons become national hate figures. Featuring the guest voices of Jim Jarmusch and John C Reilly

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Animal Airport

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Guesthouse East in Eastbourne, where Tony and Lisa Partridge hope to impress their guests with their family friendly B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita plays host at the Shirley B&B, Bournemouth, where he believes the guests will be impressed by his power showers and hopes a go-karting contest will help him win

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita of the Shirley B&B is taken ill, so the remaining B&B'ers fight it out for the prized plaque as they meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Paul and Sue from Kent, who feel ready to fulfil their dream of buying a holiday home in France, and are searching for an idyllic property in Normandy

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Sam and Elaine from Bolton find their perfect holiday home around Carcassonne in the south of France, on a budget of £225,000

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A small cavachon is rushed to see Professor Noel Fitzpatrick after being hit by a car. She has a broken leg, but also a serious heart condition. Meanwhile, Simba, a one-year-old Labrador needs help with her badly formed hips, and Tulee the nervous basset hound has diseased discs in her back that leave her in constant pain

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secret childhood of Queen Victoria's eldest grandson, the future Kaiser Wilhelm II, through a long-hidden cache of intimate family letters. Wilhelm was born with a permanently paralysed arm - a disability considered shameful at the time - and was subjected to a series of bizarre and often cruel attempts to cure the condition. These childhood experiences are believed to have helped create a highly dysfunctional connection between the boy and his mother, Victoria, Princess Royal, and to have shaped his love-hate relationship with her country

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists investigate when the remains of a young woman from the Bronze Age are found during routine roadworks on the A9 in Scotland. In her grave are clues to who she might have been, including a finely made beaker. Does she belong to the so-called Beaker People, who migrated from Europe to Britain more than 4,000 years ago?

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave (2013)
programme.desc: A free black man living in pre-Civil War New York is abducted and sold into slavery. He spends the next 12 years struggling to survive and maintain his dignity in the face of brutal treatment, while clinging to a desperate hope that he can return to his family. Oscar-winning historical drama based on Solomon Northup's autobiographical book, starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, Michael Fassbender, Benedict Cumberbatch, Lupita Nyong'o and Brad Pitt

programme.title: John & Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon's album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Lisa becomes Krusty's new assistant, but soon outshines him and earns her own TV show - which proves so popular that she wins a prestigious award. Meanwhile, Homer and Bart bond over their new hobby - coin collecting

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The death of a popular Springfield man prompts four locals to address the biggest regrets of their lives so far. Homer still feels the sting of selling his Apple shares, wife Marge worries she may have been responsible for Bart's bad-boy instincts and newsreader Kent Brockman reveals he chickened out of a career move. As for the fourth - it seems even Mr Burns liked someone

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps to deliver a child in a lift, and the mother is so grateful she names her son after him, while Lisa tries to organise the Springfield Atoms cheerleaders to revolt against the team's greedy owner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is upset to discover her new friend is a Republican - and as if that wasn't bad enough, she is running against her in the campaign to be class representative. With the guest voice of Eva Longoria (Desperate Housewives)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner introduces a unique incentive to stop pupils being naughty - a ride on a submarine. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Coast vs Country
programme.desc: Kirsty Duffy and Kerr Drummond help a couple planning to move from the French Alps to South Wales on a budget of £350,000 to decide between rural and coastal homes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Edinburgh couple David and Venus share a passion for Portugal, so would like a holiday home in the Algarve. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their £95,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lecturer Maxine and paramedic team leader Cormac got married in the scenic northern region of the Dordogne in France, and now want Ben Hillman's help to find them their dream holiday home there. They have a budget of just over £100,000 and would ideally like a property with lots of outside space, just a short walk from the town of Riberac.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Cameras follow The Jacobite steam train across the Glenfinnan Viaduct. Vloggers Geoff and Vicki, who have visited all 2,567 of Britain's railway stations, board the Caledonian Sleeper on a 24-hour return journey to the UK's highest station at Corrour. Plus, a team of engineers scramble to erect the UK's largest landslide barrier when a slip threatens a section of the world-famous West Highland Line

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to be his bodyguard as he has had death threats made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh, with Daisy Ridley, Derek Jacobi and Johnny Depp

programme.title: The World's Most Famous Train
programme.desc: During its nine-month-long season, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express makes over 60 journeys, covering 150,000 kilometres, with the majority of trips between London and Venice. The train is comprised of 17 unique 1920s carriages that have transported a host of elite individuals across Italy, Switzerland, and Turkey for more than a century. This documentary follows the stories of the staff and passengers as the train makes its way across Europe, with some customers having paid more than £2,000 for the privilege

programme.title: The Unremembered - Britain's Forgotten War Heroes
programme.desc: A century ago, in the aftermath of the First World War, Britain established vast war cemeteries to honour each individual who died serving the nation. The Commonwealth War Graves Commission set up to run them became famous for its principle of equality in death for everyone, regardless of the military rank or their role in civilian life. David Lammy journeys across Kenya and Tanzania to find out why many African soldiers and porters were overlooked during the conflict, and their names forgotten. He also looks at the impact this has on modern Africa and its communities today, and why he believes Britain has to put this right

programme.title: I Am Not a Witch (2017)
programme.desc: In a rural Zambian village, Shula, a taciturn, serious-looking pre-teen girl, is accused of witchcraft on the shaky basis that strange things have happened since she turned up out of the blue. But when Shula refuses to confirm or deny whether she's a witch, police officer Josephine contacts government official Mr Banda, who agrees to take care of her. Drama, starring Maggie Mulubwa and Nellie Munamonga. In Nyanja, Bemba and Tonga with English subtitles

programme.title: The Write Offs
programme.desc: Part two of two. After 12 weeks of intensive study, Sandi Toksvig brings her group of adult learners together in London to perform a pantomime, which presents the challenge of learning scripts and reading aloud. programme.title: PS I Love You (2007)
programme.desc: Widowed Holly feels she cannot cope following the death of her husband. However, on her birthday, she receives a letter he wrote to her just before he died, encouraging her to live life to the full rather than languish in sorrow. This is just the first in a series of messages, each one sending her on wild misadventures and helping her to move on. Romantic drama based on Cecelia Ahern's novel, starring Hilary Swank, Gerard Butler and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm

programme.title: Philip: The King Without a Crown
programme.desc: A profile of the Duke of Edinburgh, exploring how he dealt with giving up his promising naval career and his surname as he took a back seat to the Queen. From his charity patronages, to founding the Duke of Edinburgh award and becoming an unlikely champion of environmental issues, his life as Britain's longest-serving royal consort has been a significant one for the entire nation

programme.title: Live Bellator

Irishman Gallagher has won 10 of his 11 professional bouts and submitted Roman Salazar in just 35 seconds in his last contest 13 months ago. Sunderland's Gallagher has gone even longer without a fight, last competing in February 2019, when he made Nathan Greyson tap out to a first-round choke

programme.desc: Phoebe claims she kissed Ralph Lauren at Rachel's workplace, and room-mate Janine encourages Joey to get in touch with his feminine side, much to Chandler's annoyance. Ross bleaches his teeth in an effort to impress a date. Comedy, guest starring Elle Macpherson

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets people who have started self-sufficient new lives in the country. The first episode features the Cook family from Exeter, who plan to move to the other end of the country and make a fresh start in the Shetland Islands. They plan to fund their new lifestyle through AirBnB and an isolated space for authors, but their move is complicated by a serious illness in the family

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets the Goldby family from Epsom, where Vicki, Phil and their nine children have outgrown their four-bedroom house - which has only one bathroom. They have found a farmhouse with three bathrooms and scope for seven bedrooms, as well as more than two acres of land

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes look at life on board the Seven Seas Explorer features head sommelier Georgiana, as the vessel prepares for a special visit to Bordeaux. Cameras go below deck and take a peek at the unique connoisseur drinks cellar with its £3,000 bottle of cognac and observes members of the night crew as they work to get the ship looking as good as new for the morning

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian explores the Kingdom of Fife and the East, starting at Falkland Palace - a former retreat of Scottish royalty. Once a hunting lodge to eight Stuart monarchs, it is the final resting place of King James V. Susan also visits Wemyss Caves, home to the largest collection of Pictish carvings in the world, and is invited into a little-known cave whose location must remain secret. Later, she is surprised to find a Japanese garden hidden deep in the countryside and gets the chance to bat for the world's only beach cricket club on Elie beach

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James is appointed as attending vet at the Darrowby Show - but Siegfried and Tristan warn him that the job is a poisoned chalice and expect him to quit after the first day. Mrs Hall has more faith in him, however, and makes a wager with the Farnon brothers. James finds himself surrounded by pushy farmers offering bribes to help them cheat their way to victory and faces a dilemma when the Aldersons desperately need his help in securing the sale of their prize bull

programme.title: Agatha & The Curse of Ishtar (2019)
programme.desc: Young writer Agatha Christie, bruised from her divorce and struggling with fame and success, travels to Baghdad, only to be caught in a web of murder and intrigue. She finds herself mired in the decadent core of the ex-pat community, where rival archaeologists, spoiled funders, bored partners, the downtrodden support staff and the upper-class all co-exist in a hotbed of rumour, feud and scandal. Lyndsey Marshal stars in an alternative history period drama, set in the winter of 1928

programme.title: Our Valley Family
programme.desc: Sisters Shania and Nikita battle it out in a bid to be the first to pass their driving test - spurred on by their mum's promise that the winner gets a car. Dado is encouraged to get to grips with his first smartphone and, after some intense tuition, he attempts to set up a fan site for Poppy the dog on Instagram - with mixed results

programme.title: OAPs Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Documentary following British pensioners growing old disgracefully in Benidorm. One couple attend a swingers club for ex-pats and locals. But with the 124-strong guest list ranging in age from 24 to the mid-70s, will the party be a success? Meanwhile, entrepreneur Lee prepares to dazzle the crowds at his Rocket Rabbi stunt show and it is make or break for granny rapper Janie B when she attends an audition - only for a bout of food poisoning to jeopardise her chances

programme.title: Big Body Squad
programme.desc: Cameras follow three super-sized individuals whose weight keeps them trapped in their own homes. Weighing nearly 60 stone, Keith is a virtual prisoner in his bed, and even washing him presents a huge challenge for his carers

programme.title: Robin Williams: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: Robin Williams found success early in his career, but with this fame came personal difficulties too. In this documentary, those who knew the comedy mastermind recall the man they loved, the sadness he faced and reminisce on his rise to the top of the comedy world

programme.title: Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse inside the confectionery world, visiting factories, chocolatiers and shops, and even revealing the Queen's favourite chocolates

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Our Dream Hotel
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi comes to the aid of hoteliers who are just starting out in the hospitality industry. Her first port of call is an imposing Victorian mansion in the Orkneys which has been bought by the Hodgson family from Brighton, who hope to have completed renovations in time for the tourist season - but are having to do a lot of the work themselves, despite lacking experience

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: A rescue dog from Romania presents Graeme Hall with one of his toughest challenges - since it is afraid of men, it is impossible for him to get anywhere near it. The second assignment involves a Jack Russell with a volatile and unpredictable temper, and finally, Graeme deals with a labrador cross that is afraid of travelling in cars, which the owner fears may cause an accident

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: Four orphaned hedgehogs are rescued, and an adventurous squirrel needs assistance

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice helps a chauffeur and his girlfriend spruce up their neglected seaside bungalow in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, to make it more attractive to potential buyers, transforming the interior and landscaping the overgrown gardens. Presented by Alistair Appleton

programme.title: Thunder Over Arizona (1956)
programme.desc: An honest cowboy is mistaken for the notorious outlaw he killed in self-defence. Before he can clear up the misunderstanding, he is approached by a corrupt mayor who draws him into a conspiracy to wrest control of a silver mine from its rightful owners. Western, starring Skip Homeier, Kristine Miller, George Macready and Wallace Ford

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: Dark Command (1940)
programme.desc: A teacher is defeated in his ambition to become the marshal of his town during the early years of the American Civil War, so he turns renegade instead. Before long he has a reputation as a feared raider fighting on the side of the South, and it falls to the newly appointed lawman whose job he coveted to stop his reign of terror. Western, starring John Wayne and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: A TV reporter investigating a presidential misdemeanour stumbles on evidence that a comet is on a collision course with Earth, threatening the future of the human race. Meanwhile, an astronaut prepares to lead his crew on a do-or-die mission to intercept the danger. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Duvall, Tea Leoni, Morgan Freeman and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)
programme.desc: Hitman Arthur Bishop's arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his new girlfriend Gina and blackmails him into committing three assassinations in as many days, while making them look like accidents. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Jessica Alba, Sam Hazeldine and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone (2008)
programme.desc: The ruthless vigilante considers hanging up his guns when he learns a gangster he killed was actually an undercover FBI agent. However, he must return to his war on crime when a mobster who was hideously disfigured at his hands assembles a gang of violent criminals to cause mayhem on the streets of New York. Action thriller based on the Marvel comic-book, starring Ray Stevenson and Dominic West

programme.title: Anthropoid (2016)
programme.desc: Second World War drama based on the true story of Operation Anthropoid, the mission to assassinate SS general Reinhard Heydrich, the main architect behind the Final Solution and the Reich's third in command after Hitler and Himmler. Starring Jamie Dornan and Cillian Murphy

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre longs for his simple life as a feared monster, so strikes a deal with magical trickster Rumpelstiltskin to get back to the way things were. However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: Risen (2016)
programme.desc: A Roman officer and his assistant are charged with investigating what became of Jesus' body following the crucifixion, as the Roman hierarchy fears stories of a resurrected Messiah may lead to an uprising in Jerusalem. However, what they discover during their search forces them to question everything they believe. Biblical drama, starring Joseph Fiennes and Tom Felton

programme.title: Layer Cake (2004)
programme.desc: A London cocaine dealer is all set to leave the criminal world behind and start a new life abroad. However, his plans are thwarted when he is asked to track down a gangster's drug-addicted daughter and locate a stolen shipment of Ecstasy. Crime thriller, starring Daniel Craig, Michael Gambon, Colm Meaney, Kenneth Cranham and Sienna Miller

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane (2016)
programme.desc: A woman survives a car crash, and wakes up to find herself in an underground bunker, belonging to a survivalist who claims that a devastating attack has left the outside world uninhabitable. As his behaviour becomes increasingly stranger, she begins to fear she is being tricked and resolves to discover the truth for herself. Thriller, starring Mary Elizabeth Winstead and John Goodman

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Over the Hedge (2006)
programme.desc: A raccoon trickster is fretting about his debt to a fearsome bear when he stumbles on some animals waking in the woods after their winter nap. Spotting the chance to solve his problem, the raccoon dupes the gullible creatures into stealing food from a nearby suburb so he can give it to the bear - but they fail to realise they will soon be at the mercy of a vermin exterminator. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bruce Willis, Steve Carell, Garry Shandling and William Shatner

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, the conclusion of the trilogy of prequels to the 1968 movie. Starring Andy Serkis, Woody Harrelson and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Filth (2013)
programme.desc: A corrupt policeman with a cocaine habit plans to advance his own career by turning colleagues against each other, while also desperately hoping to persuade his ex-wife to take him back. He rapidly loses his grip on reality as the drug use spirals out of control and his web of lies grows increasingly complex. Black comedy, starring James McAvoy, Imogen Poots, Jamie Bell and Jim Broadbent

programme.title: Jallikattu (2019)
programme.desc: A buffalo escapes from the slaughterhouse and wreaks havoc in a remote village in Kerala. Indian crime drama, starring Antony Varghese and Chemban Vinod Jose. In Malayalam

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the inmates in order to try to get information about a criminal operation. Back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman

programme.title: Young Sheldon

Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

However, some of the owners are dismayed by modern gadgets with a lack of instructions, and even find cobwebs in their rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the Trafford in Blackpool, owned by Robbie and John Welling, who are proud of their traditional 'bucket and spade' B&B. The guests are pleasantly surprised, even if previous host Phil is intent on finding dust as a bit of tit-for-tat retaliation, and the afternoon is spent learning the art of making sticks of rock

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Host Julie welcomes the contestants to Sheepy Lodge, Warwickshire, where they are shocked by their surroundings, and disappointed by a variety of things in the rooms. The host puts on some old-fashioned parlour games, before a fierce hide-and-seek contest erupts. At breakfast, Julie frets when she must prepare poached eggs, and is left emotional after the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival B&B owners meet to settle some scores and discover what they have been paid. Knockaloe Beg Farm owners Fiona and John Anderson tackle criticisms of a missing host at breakfast, and Phil Routledge from The Arches on the Isle of Man takes on Robbie and John Welling from The Trafford in Blackpool about their 'forensic investigation'. After some heated discussion, the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the hidden lives of the animals of Chester Zoo. The Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for almost two years and is reaching the end of her tether. She's given birth to a stillborn baby in the past, so the keepers have a close eye on her. Cameras also follow Red panda Jung, who has been getting the cold shoulder from his partner Nima since they had two cubs

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to the village of Clifford, West Yorkshire, to meet Vic and Paul Miller, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Vic feels that the pair should look for a new home more suitable for them and their two young twins, but Paul believes they could use the budget to transform the property's layout and create a more functional family space

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Simon and Jill Bennett as they try to restore two timber-framed barns in Suffolk. The couple found out that one of the buildings is among the smallest surviving medieval guildhalls in the country, and while Kevin advises them to conserve it in its present state, Simon is determined to restore it to its former glory

programme.title: 23 Cases
programme.desc: Tara and Henry move on to the next potentially unsolved crime when they discover that the urn holding the ashes of one of the 23 victims, Hans Willcke, has been stolen from the crematorium. Rapp's demands over his assistance become even more excessive and lead to traged. Thriller, starring Shadi Hedayati and Franz Dinda. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St George's Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in A&E after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics help a man who is fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest, while a tumble on an obstacle course leaves fun-runner Vijitha with a painful open fracture

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another chance to see some of the programme's more memorable investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Bulgaria to find out why rose oil is considered liquid gold. Plus, Matt Tebbutt delves into the secret world of baker's yeast to find out what gives sourdough bread its twang, and Kate Quilton explores the power of beetroot

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends for over 20 years, Julie and Jan from Tyne and Wear have had several holidays on the island of Lanzarote. They're now dreaming of owning a bolthole on the island to enjoy with their friends and families and have a budget of £115,000 between them. Jasmine Harman joins them on the Canary Island and shows them five properties to consider, all around the Puerto del Carmen area

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin is on the Canary Island of Tenerife helping husband and wife Teresa and Robin find their dream holiday home that they hope to retire to in the future. Having visited the island six times in the last few years, it's quickly become their favourite place. With five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, will they find what they're looking for?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman searches for properties on the Canary Island of Gran Canaria for couple Kim and Steve, who have a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with house-hunters from previous episodes for whom space was a decisive issue. In East Lothian, he visits Ian, who wanted a workshop for his collection of vehicles and spare parts, while in Wolverhampton, he drops in on Darren and Me'sha, who wanted room for a recording studio

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets architect Louise Ostendorf and her husband Milko, who are trying to build a Manhattan-style loft apartment in a disused violin factory in central London. Among their ambitious plans are a three-storey kitchen-dining room, all manner of modern gadgets and glass and steel decor

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marketing manager Andrea Nichols hosts the first night in a week of dinner parties that span Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire. She welcomes dance instructor Nicola O'Donnell, saleswoman Penny Peklivanas, music producer Tim Lawson and events entertainer Andy Harvey into her garden that has been decked out with straw and stuffed chickens in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kitchenware saleswoman Penny Peklivanas hosts the second party in a competition that spans Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire. She is confident her grand house will impress her rivals and win her the £1,000 cash prize, but her croissant-based main course is not to everyone's taste

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT analyst and music producer Tim Lawson hosts the third dinner party of the week in the competition taking place across Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire, hoping to impress his diners with ingredients brought back from Morocco. He also offers an urban music education in a bid to claim the £1,000-prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance instructor Nicola O'Donnell hosts the fourth dinner party of the competition spanning Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire. The guests expect very little from the night, but Nicola hopes to impress Jamaican-born contestant Tim Lawson with her Caribbean-inspired evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Andy Harvey hosts the final night of the competition which has visited Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire. He decides to pull out all the stops at his Stevenage home, hoping to impress with extravagant food and outrageous entertainment - including a luminous underwater disco. At the end of the evening, his dinner guests reveal their scores before the winner of the £1,000 prize is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Who'd a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where partners Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin hope to impress their fellow guests. On arrival, Liz and Brian are excited over their two hot tubs, and Jackie and Paul are more than happy with the complimentary champagne. However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. However, Jackie and Paul are unimpressed by their small room, and Joe and Alex find the cleanliness levels lacking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where B&B newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. They take their guests to a local maze in the afternoon and, after an uncomfortable night's sleep for Alex, some of the breakfast orders are misplaced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine welcome their guests to The Great Trewern B&B, Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where they enjoy the quiet life. Joe and Alex feel far away from it all, but the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress the other guests. At dinner, talk turns to first impressions and it appears it is all water under the bridge for Jackie and Joe, but she remains upset with the feedback Matthew and Liam gave her

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one final time to find out what they have been paid. Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin kick things off by confronting Matthew Bracegirdle and Liam Halewood about their comments regarding the cleanliness of their establishment, and Jackie and Paul Langshaw complain about their poor breakfast score

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: The Cairngorm Mountain Rescue team search for a climber in the Monadhliath Mountains, and the Newquay Search and Rescue team look for missing divers. In the Lake District, Langdale Ambleside Mountain Rescue help a woman following a bouldering accident

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The documentary detailing the daily work of staff at St George's Hospital in south-west London continues, this time highlighting the stories of patients who received support from loved ones when life became tough. Gerald, a 66-year-old trained lifeguard and polo club official is rushed into A&E, having sustained a serious head wound after a 10-foot fall. The friends and family of 55-year-old Beverly gather at the hospital when she is admitted with a broken leg after being hit by a car near her home, and Paul, a 39-year-old father-of-three, arrives in resus with a nasty cut to his right arm. Paul complains that he is unable to move his fingers, leading staff to believe be may have significant tendon or nerve damage that could leave him permanently unable to use his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, who's 89, arrives at St George's with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to A&E after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. He's broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Mrs Doyle wins a competition to meet a famous singer, and discreetly invites him round for tea - but the secret slips out, and soon the house is besieged by hordes of adoring pensioners. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A smooth-talking priest offers Ted a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to leave Craggy Island and run his own parish in Beverly Hills, but first he has to tell Jack, Dougal and Mrs Doyle that they are not invited. Final episode of the clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, with Tommy Tiernan, Jeff Harding and a cameo appearance by music star Brian Eno

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the famous quiz, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Rhod Gilbert and Sara Pascoe. Countdown regular Susie Dent is assisted in Dictionary Corner by Johnny Vegas, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little help from Joey Essex

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw secretly restore a 1960s Mercedes-Benz 230SL Pagoda, which the owner had to abandon after suffering a heart attack

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore an Aston Martin DB6 for its owner, who has been prevented from working on it by a serious fall and chronic health problems

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a Renault 5 GT Turbo belonging to a man who was forced to abandon work on it after suffering serious organ failure

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Kerry Bolwell-Williams kicks off a week of dinner parties in the Welsh valleys, where she hopes that a full choir and a simple menu will impress her guests and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she does not react well when it is suggested that her home has a rather distinctive smell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover and theme park fan Dave Morris hosts the second dinner party in the Welsh valleys, hoping his home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and complicated menu will win him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop owner Tasnim Sardar hosts the third night of the competition in the Welsh valleys, and hopes her Pakistani-inspired party will secure her the £1,000 prize. Financial advisor Gill Leonard likes her curries to be hot and spicy, and is particularly pleased by Tasnim's curried cauliflower

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ryan Woodward hosts on the fourth night in the Welsh valleys and has put a lot of thought into his evening, but each of his courses goes wrong - from a bread blunder to a clam crisis. He hopes an Ibizan dance lesson and drinks served in his hot tub will help to turn the party around

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Welsh valleys, financial advisor Gill Leonard dons the oven gloves to entertain the other contestants, and there is a dramatic start to the evening thanks to a mock fire-breathing dragon. Later, the host makes a remarkable revelation to her shocked guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors' expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud oversees the efforts of Jonathan Belsey, a scientist who is trying to build a carbon-neutral home for his partner and their four daughters. The design and construction are risky because they feature untested technology and an uncompromising choice of materials, and he soon finds the costs spiralling out of control

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Humberside Search and Rescue rush to Thornwick Bay to help an injured man, and the Cairngorm Mountain Rescue team embarks on a night search to find a missing biker

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sam's parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in A&E with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.title: Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on parents who go the extra mile to care for their children. They include Rob, who swapped life on the road as a long-haul trucker to become the primary carer to his four-year-old daughter Chelsea, who was born with a serious kidney disorder and has spent more than 200 nights of her life in hospital. Meanwhile, Shafak is bringing up four children by herself, including Eman, who also has a kidney condition, meaning more than a cupful of water a day could kill her. The seven-year-old is drinking more than her allowance - so Shafak must be a loving mother and disciplinarian at the same time

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Humberside Search and Rescue rush to Thornwick Bay to help an injured man, and the Cairngorm Mountain Rescue team embarks on a night search to find a missing biker

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: In Oxford, John goes against his wife's advice and ends up in a conflict with Dan, while Linda thinks she has spotted something the other bidders are yet to see, and George and Rupert take a risk on mysterious items hidden under dust sheets. Presented by Sean Kelly

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Nat and John's day in Glasgow gets off to a flying start, but Dan's dirty tactics lead to mayhem within the team. Meanwhile, George finds himself with a new pet

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble on a surprise find in a man-cave full of cars. They also encounter an eccentric seller who answers to an otherworldly power

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are feeling lucky as they head to the huge stockpile of a Kentucky collector who is desperate to sell his collection before his roof caves in

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Coverage from Mumbai of the offbeat event, where teams create vehicles without engines or brakes and race downhill

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May buy second-hand lorries and set about discovering how difficult it is to become an HGV driver. The Porsche 911 and Lamborghini Gallardo are put to the test, and Michael Parkinson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and the team take on their toughest challenge yet - keeping their tongues in check during a meeting with their counterparts from the German equivalent of the show. James May also test-drives a quirky Japanese car, and Richard Hammond puts a Mazda concept car through its paces. Jamiroquai frontman Jay Kay is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef is invited to a family feast in Corfu and learns how to make authentic Greek food in restaurant kitchens around the island. Later, Rick heads for familiar surroundings in Majorca, where he worked as a teenage cook, and finds out what British tourists like to eat

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America to take a road trip from San Francisco to the heart of Utah in three new-generation muscle cars, hoping this time to avoid a pelting with rocks by a mob of angry locals. Back in the UK, the Fiat 500 Abarth gets a test-drive and Will Young is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters try to make an ordinary second-hand car lap the test track as fast as a new, purpose-built sports saloon. James May meets former Formula 1 World Champion Mika Hakkinen to discover why Finns are such good racing drivers, Richard Hammond tests the Veritas sports car, and actor Mark Wahlberg is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's time for the grand final, which features peas, teas and absent keys, as Ed Gamble, Jo Brand, Katy Wix and Rose Matafeo vie to go home with Greg Davies's massive golden face

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Comedian Lolly Adefope, journalist and presenter Dan Walker, presenter Sarah Greene and comedian Miles Jupp test their general knowledge skills, with an overall champion being crowned for the week

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Denise Lewis, Richard Osman, Robert Rinder and Katherine Ryan to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Insert Name Here
programme.desc: Comedians Hugh Dennis, Omid Djalili and Roisin Conaty and anatomist, author and broadcaster Alice Roberts join team captains Richard Osman and Josh Widdicombe to answer questions about famous people who share a name, with the winners earning the right to pick the greatest bearer of the moniker. Sue Perkins hosts

programme.title: Terminator Salvation (2009)
programme.desc: In a future dominated by the deadly robots, resistance leader John Connor fights to stop the creation of an advanced new terminator and searches for the teenager destined to go back in time and become his father. Elsewhere, a mysterious stranger with no memory is about to learn the shocking truth about his origins. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Christian Bale, Sam Worthington and Anton Yelchin

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The series reaches its majestic climax. Who will win Greg Davies's coveted golden head to become just the seventh Taskmaster Champion in history?

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Topical comedy quiz show, hosted by Dara O Briain. Regular panellist Hugh Dennis looks back on another eventful week in news and politics, with the help of guests Tom Allen, Ed Byrne, Rhys James, Milton Jones and Deborah Frances-White. programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Churchill's Bodyguard
programme.desc: Thompson saves Churchill from being crushed alive, but is unable to prevent a civilian sustaining broken bones. The pair part officially, and the Prime Minister makes a heartfelt announcement

programme.title: Mission: Kill Hitler
programme.desc: A plot to kill the fuhrer that remained secret until the late 1990s. Operation Foxley planned to murder Hitler during his daily morning walk at the Berghof, his Bavarian residence. Two soldiers parachuted into the area were supposed to find a perfect location to shoot Hitler and stop the devastating war. Based on the British Secret Services' declassified documents, using archives and fictionalised reconstitutions, this film recounts the full story and the detailed plan that should have led to the murder of Adolf Hitler, and explains why it failed.

programme.desc: The final part of Francis Whately's trilogy of films on Bowie's life, telling the story of the five years when many of the ideas that would help him become an icon were first born. Starting in 1966, soon after David Jones changed his name to David Bowie, the film traces his interest in everything from Holst and Pinky and Perky to Anthony Newley and Tibetan Buddhism, and how he used all of these influences to create not only Ziggy Stardust, but the material for his entire career

In the second episode, Grayson takes a bike trip down the relatively prosperous East Coast of the US, from the liberal holiday playground of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts, to a 'woke' enclave of Brooklyn, he explores issues of social class, economic opportunity and access to education, and tries to understand how America's liberals now view their own country

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sushi Ko, a Japanese restaurant in California that is losing up to $20,000 a month. Gordon finds owner and chef Akira lacking in confidence and self-esteem as the strain of an empty business is beginning to take its toll on his relationship with this family

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maître D' Fred Sirieix and his team fling open the doors of the restaurant of romance once more, and first in is self-confessed party animal Nikita - a 24-year-old from Swansea who's hunting for someone just as wild. However, she gets a little more than she bargained for when engineer Rhys reveals a rather intimate tattoo. Part-time fitness instructor and disco dancer Selvin meets Donna, who seeks a man who can make her laugh. Former Playboy bunny Kelly-Ann is a model who's dated some A-list stars in her time and wants 'a daring man' to keep her feeling alive. Will tattooed motorbike daredevil Stephen tickle her fancy?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The celebrated armchair critics share their critiques on shows including Ratched, Council House Britain, Family Fortunes, This Morning, Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites, First Dates and BBC News coverage of royal finances, students and the moment the Prime Minister appeared to be confused by his own rules

programme.title: John & Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon's album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby visits a pharmaceutical lab to investigate a murder case, but when armed men storm the facility and hold everyone hostage, she is trapped within the building with no means of communicating with the outside world. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate the murder of a retired US Navy lieutenant commander, and the inquiry forces Ducky to reveal he has been working as part of a secret society dedicated to solving cold cases. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A black minister raises the question of racial intolerance when a 12-year-old boy is killed in a hit-and-run in Harlem and the Jewish driver escapes punishment. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy Wall Street stockbroker's death looks like suicide, but Logan suspects otherwise and pins the blame on the man's protege. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. However, they find themselves unable to arrest him due to confidentiality rules, and his patients' reluctance to talk

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a board-member at an exclusive private school, and a man's ambitions for his offspring are stretched to the limit when he admits to the crime, despite the fact his son was the gunman. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A missing US Navy lieutenant's car is found covered in blood, and the team discovers she had been profiling men to find the perfect partner. When further investigations reveal she had planned to attend a seminar at a local hotel, Ziva goes undercover in a bid to find out more. Meanwhile, Jenny makes Tony a secret offer

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The shooting of a petty officer looks like an open-and-shut case when a Russian man is found with a recently fired gun in his car. However, the investigation takes a dramatic turn when it is revealed he is working as a spy for the Department of Homeland Security. Military crime drama, with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a lance corporal, whose body has been found in an empty house, and discovers he had a number of spurned lovers and a $2million inheritance. Ducky and Gibbs interview one of the dead marine's partners, but disagree over whether she is telling the truth. David McCallum and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Kidnappers strike on Halloween, wounding a marine sergeant and snatching his daughter - leaving the team members wondering why anyone would try to extort money from someone on such a modest salary. As the agents begin searching for a motive, Abby surprises everyone by turning up at the lab in a revealing fancy-dress costume

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his old flame, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. Travelling to the crime scene to conduct a joint murder-kidnapping investigation, Dinozzi and McGee offer their assistance in searching for the missing doctors. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Sean Murray, with Scottie Thompson

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are drawn into a series of psychological games by Merritt Rook (guest star Robin Williams), an engineer whose obsessive hatred of authority proves popular with the public and wins him a cult following. Hard-hitting drama, with Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a pregnant woman is found in a burnt-out building, triggering an investigation that leads the team to suspect a wealthy coffee trader and his son may be responsible. The case eventually goes to court, but a mistrial is declared - to the dismay of Novak, who vows to fight on regardless

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the poisoning of a well-known historian, pursuing a line of inquiry that leads to the victim's cash-strapped brother. Unfortunately, he too is later found murdered, and the detectives turn their attention to the two men's wives - only to discover that both stood to gain from being widowed. Drama, guest starring Rip Torn

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler are forced to explain their actions after the stabbing of a fireman leads to a massive brawl and an official inquiry. When questions arise concerning the victim's sexual preference, the detectives link the crime to a similar murder 12 years earlier - but a secret the wife has been keeping could hold the key to solving the case. Drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed
