programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits the opera and finds that, amid the hysteria and emotion of the singing world, a murder has taken place that appears at first to be a case of self-defence. A world-famous tenor faces a battle to clear his name. Angela Lansbury and Keith Michell star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica meets an old friend who happens to be one of the best homicide detectives in Los Angeles, and helps provide the vital clue in the case that ended his career. Starring Angela Lansbury and Barry Newman

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman disrupts Cabot Cove's mayoral election campaign by claiming one of the candidates is her secret husband and the father of her five children. Jessica steps in to investigate when she is found dead. Ruth Roman guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Three people claim the body of an unidentified man who is discovered dead on a railway line in an attempt to cash in on the will. Whodunit, guest starring Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An unscrupulous landlord is killed, and suspicion falls on an impoverished factory worker whose life he made hell. However, Jessica is not convinced of the woman's guilt and sets out to unmask the real killer. Guest starring Lorna Luft, alongside Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is stunned to discover after uncovering a trail of feuding and intrigue in the Californian property business, that her niece is the logical prime suspect for the murder of a rich movie heiress in Beverly Hills. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites the suspects of a 25-year-old murder case to try to put an end to the mystery once and for all - but the exercise leads to more grim consequences. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, with Donald O'Connor and Anne Francis

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Maggie McCauley, Jessica's former student and now the producer of a TV police show, gets involved in a heated argument with the network programmer who is planning to cancel the series. When her colleague is found dead in suspicious circumstances, Maggie draws upon the deductive skills gleaned from her mentor to repel the accusations against her and find the real killer

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of old friend and New York police officer James O'Malley, who is investigating a suicide he believes was actually a murder. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former jewel thief and Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton spends a romantic evening with a woman, only to find himself the prime suspect in a puzzling murder. A coin collector is found dead and the sleuth must try to prevent an injustice being done. Keith Michell guest stars, with Angela Lansbury and Dina Merrill

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to her cousin's wedding, but the groom is murdered well before he reaches 'till death us do part'. The amateur sleuth immediately sets out to unmask the culprit and wonders whether the gruesome event could be linked to the release of the bride's brother from a psychiatric institution. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's nephew Grady and his pregnant wife Donna agree to house-sit for the mystery-solving author while she is out of town, and are shocked when they wake one night to discover the body of an amputee in her living room. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is tasked to track down a man who is picking up and then attacking closet gay married men. After a suspect is apprehended, his attorney manages to muddy the waters regarding the legitimacy of the arrest. Mariska Hargitay and Raul Esparza star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Chester Lake is suspected of murdering a police officer, and Fin's investigation into his history reveals he has been working with a freelance team solving cold cases. Details emerge that Lake has kidnapped the friend of a 14-year-old girl who was raped and murdered - but the focus turns to the dead cop as more evidence is uncovered. Drama, starring Adam Beach, Ice-T and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a hip-hop producer initially leads detectives to believe he was killed for reasons connected to his career, but evidence later emerges to suggest it was actually due to a romantic liaison. A suspect is finally identified - but a shock confession demolishes the prosecution team's case. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives are called in on Thanksgiving and assigned to find the missing daughter of the NYPD's first deputy commissioner - an investigation that ends in tragedy with the discovery of her body. Meanwhile, Goren is distracted from the case as he struggles with a personal crisis concerning his mother. Michael Biehn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler investigate the death of former child star Alvin Stevens, following a trail of clues that leads them to Albanian mobsters and a DVD counterfeiting operation. As inquiries proceed, they also encounter a washed-up celebrity who enjoyed screen success as a youngster. Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson star

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs

programme.title: Columbo Goes to College (1991)
programme.desc: Two criminology students murder their professor and cover their tracks with false clues. They think they are on the way to outwitting everyone - but find themselves at the bottom of the class when Columbo intervenes. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Stephen Caffrey, Gary Hershberger and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: Double Exposure (1973)
programme.desc: A maker of motivational films based on subliminal messages uses his expertise to plant a subconscious command in the mind of a rival to lure him to his death. However, any hopes of his getting away with it are dashed by the arrival of a certain shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Culp, Robert Middleton, Louise Latham and Arlene Martel

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr

programme.title: Columbo: Murder by the Book (1971)
programme.desc: An author of mystery novels kills his former writing partner so he can claim sole credit for their collaborations, and tries to appear innocent by offering to help Columbo solve the crime. Detective drama, directed by Steven Spielberg, starring Peter Falk, Jack Cassidy, Rosemary Forsyth and Barbara Colby

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A woman's murder bears the hallmarks of one committed by jailed serial killer Kevin Reddick, raising fears that he has found an accomplice to carry on his work while he is in prison. The investigation leads back to a series of experiments performed on Reddick to discover the cause of his madness

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A janitor violently attacks a school coach, but the SVU team uncovers mitigating circumstances, connecting his behaviour to a history of sexual abuse. They identify more victims of the same predator, including a prisoner Reggie Rhodes (Mike Tyson) on death row. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: FBI agent Dana Lewis suspects that a 25-year-old rape-murder case in New York is connected to several unsolved crimes across the country and joins the SVU to investigate. Lewis relentlessly pursues her prime suspect, but Benson and Amaro have their doubts about his guilt. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of three. The investigation into the warring prostitution rings threatens to tear the SVU team apart, but the squad is determined to uncover the truth. Cragen also stands accused of murder. Return of the crime drama, starring Dann Florek and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part three of three. Cragen wakes up alongside a dead escort, who had been a potential witness. The squad tries to bring the case to a close as the detectives reach breaking point. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Wheeler investigate when a popular online video blogger is apparently kidnapped during a live broadcast, but begin to doubt the crime really occurred. However, the case takes a strange turn when a ransom demand is made. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars, and veteran US news reporter Larry King appears as himself

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team continue with their most ambitious project to date, with the assistance of the local community and two royal helpers, Prince William and Prince Harry. The second edition sees them create a home for a veteran, who is a triple amputee after an IED blew up in Afghanistan. They are also aiming to renovate the fronts of the houses on the street and put in new utilities, as well as creating a lasting legacy in the form of a support centre, which will help other veterans find homes and jobs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team are joined by an army of local tradespeople to transform the home of another family in need of help, with a designer on hand to ensure the builders don't stray too far from his or her vision

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin their road trip in Somerset, setting off in the town of Watchet, before heading to an auction in Frome. Narrated by Tim Wonnacott

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin the second leg of their journey in Bath, before travelling through the Cotswolds to an auction in Stroud, Gloucestershire. Narrated by Tim Wonnacott

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin their third leg in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, travelling through Worcestershire and picking up bargains as they head to an auction in Wrexham, north Wales. Narrated by Tim Wonnacott

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Thomas Plant and Charlie Ross travel across Shropshire in search of valuable finds, and begin their journey in Church Stretton, before moving on to stopping Welshpool, Oswestry and Wrexham before travelling to sell their bargains at an auction in Minsterley

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Having set off in Somerset on Monday on their week-long journey, Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin the last leg in the West Midlands, passing Lichfield and Walsall before ending at their final auction showdown in Bedford

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: After years spent dedicated to their demanding careers in nursing and social work, Gillian and Paul Clarke from Stockport have decided it's time to start taking it a little easier and put themselves first. They've got their hearts set on a holiday home on Spain's Costa Cálida where they can boogie their way to retirement. Jonnie Irwin shows the couple five properties for their budget of £45,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: After becoming foster parents to three young children, Jo Danson and her husband Bill decided a holiday home would be the perfect way for everyone to spend quality time together. Working within a budget of £65,000, Jasmine Harman shows Jo five suitable properties in the Orihuela Costa region of Spain

programme.title: Cash in the Spare Room
programme.desc: A couple wants to create a budget-friendly log hideaway in the grounds of their property. In the Brecon Beacons, a retiree is turning an old caravan into an African-themed retreat.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Birmingham pair Derek Hansel and Gina Awoko are looking for a home in Almeria, Spain, that they can eventually retire to and also generate some rental income from. Jasmine Harman shows them a range of properties within their £300,000 budget, from a coastal renovation project to an inland cortijo. However, it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect property in the perfect location

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team take on their most ambitious project to date and transform a whole street of run-down empty properties in Manchester into homes for veterans. They are joined by the local community, as well as Prince William and Prince Harry, who volunteer their assistance on site. In the first edition of the two-part special, the team builds houses for two former soldiers who fought in Iraq and Afghanistan and are suffering from post-traumatic stress disorder. However, with the number of volunteers lacking and the buildings proving to be trickier than expected, the build is becoming the toughest yet

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Doctors try to save a man's hand after a horrifying accident at work. A 19-year-old woman causes concern with a serve asthma attack

programme.title: Raising Tourette's
programme.desc: Documentary following families raising adolescents with Tourette syndrome, a tic disorder characterised by involuntary, repetitive movements and random - sometimes obscene - vocalisations. High school senior and Tourette's sufferer Kristen and her mother Rebekah brace for homecoming and new 'kid on the block' Kaden reveals his condition to his classmates

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: In March 2007, Brian Lewis murdered Hayley Jones - his partner and the mother of his four children - by stabbing her with a kitchen knife as she slept. The couple had drifted apart after Lewis lost his job and he became increasingly suspicious of her online activities, with the final straw for him coming when she changed her status to 'single' on a social-networking site. This programme uses dramatic reconstruction to chart the key events in the case, using witness testimony, crime reports, forensic evidence and expert commentary

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike is having financial trouble, so Laura decides to help out. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike's van and where he can park it interferes in the development of his relationship with Laura. Judi Dench and Michael Williams star

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Trio (1950)
programme.desc: Adaptation of three short stories by W Somerset Maugham, The Verger, Mr Know-Al, and The Sanatorium. Starring James Hayter, Anne Crawford and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Hot Enough for June (1964)
programme.desc: An unemployed writer gets a job for an industrialist and is sent on a business trip to Prague. However, he does not realise his boss is actually in the British Secret Service and is using him to unwittingly carry out an important mission - while his local chauffeur is really a Communist agent. Spy comedy, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylva Koscina, Robert Morley, Leo McKern and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow heads for 18th-century Paris to discover how the insanitary living conditions endured by its poorest residents helped bring about the French Revolution. He visits a perfumer to re-create some of the city's unsavoury smells, and finds out what happened to the thousands of bodies that overflowed from cemeteries during the Terror of 1793. He also tries his hand at tanning leather the traditional way - using dog faeces and urine

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s, telling the story of popular music from its earliest origins to 1975. The first programme considers how the genre became an essential part of life and depicts the struggle of individuals to survive the demands placed on them by the music industry

programme.title: Music Within (2007)
programme.desc: The true story of Richard Pimentel, a brilliant public speaker with a troubled past, who returns from Vietnam severely hearing-impaired and finds a new purpose in his landmark efforts on the behalf of Americans with disabilities. Biographical drama, starring Ron Livingston, Melissa George and Michael Sheen

programme.title: Fords on Water (1983)
programme.desc: Two unemployed young men living in London find themselves with little hope for the future. They refuse to be resigned to their fate, so one night they steal a car and drive north, seeking something better from their lives. Comedy, starring Elvis Payne and Mark Wingett

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney talks to former gang members as he explores Britain's criminal underworld. In the first edition, he finds out about Glasgow in the 1950s and 60s, meeting Walter Norval, who once led the XYY gang

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Enticed by the prospect of a big boost to his wages, Mike applies for a job at the detested DIY superstore, while back at Hamway's Hardware, the lads try to entice more women through the door by 'feminising' the premises _ much to the consternation of regular male customers

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s, telling the story of popular music from its earliest origins to 1975. The first programme considers how the genre became an essential part of life and depicts the struggle of individuals to survive the demands placed on them by the music industry

programme.title: Tightrope to Terror (1983)
programme.desc: Four children on a camping holiday in Italy are involved in a dangerous cable car accident that leaves them dangling 150 feet above a glacier. Children's adventure, starring Richard Owens and Mark Jefferis

programme.title: Paper Tiger (1975)
programme.desc: An English tutor enthralls a Japanese ambassador's son with improbable fantasies of his heroic exploits, but then finds himself forced to act them out for real when he and the boy are both kidnapped. Comedy adventure, starring David Niven, Toshiro Mifune, Hardy Kruger and Ivan Desny

programme.title: Miracle in Soho (1957)
programme.desc: A cynical road-repairer falls for the alluring charms of an Italian girl working as a barmaid, only to discover she and her family are planning to move to Canada. Romantic drama written by Emeric Pressburger, starring John Gregson, Belinda Lee and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Brixton and Harmondsworth for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining what impact the relationships between cousins Nicholas II of Russia, Kaiser Wilhelm II of Germany and George V of the United Kingdom had on the outbreak of the First World War. This episode focuses on the story of the emerging divisions and rivalries between the inter-related royal houses of Europe during the 19th century. Featuring contributions by historians Karina Urbach, Miranda Carter and Piers Brendon. Tamsin Greig narrates

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the history of Windsor Castle, which has evolved over more than 1,000 years from its original role as a fortress and was nearly destroyed by a fire in 1992. Inside the residence is a musket ball that killed a naval hero, jewel-encrusted gold and silver table decorations, and Queen Mary's doll's house - complete with running water and a secret garden

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Dream the Impossible (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about paraplegic motorcycle racer and paralympic skier Talan Skeels-Piggins, who has founded a charity to train paralysed people to ride adapted motorbikes

programme.title: Blue Iguana (2018)
programme.desc: Eddie and Paul, former prisoners working in a New York diner, are made an offer they cannot refuse by English lawyer Katherine Rookwood. Romantic comedy, starring Sam Rockwell, Phoebe Fox and Ben Schwartz

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.title: Anoop and The Elephant (1972)
programme.desc: Two English children meet an Indian boy and his pet elephant, and help to keep the animal out of the hands of a greedy circus owner. Family drama, with Anoop Singh and Phil Daniels

programme.title: Exploits at West Poley (1985)
programme.desc: Two boys exploring an underground cave divert the course of a river, with surprising repercussions for two towns. Children's period drama, with Brenda Fricker and Charlie Condou

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Hot Enough for June (1964)
programme.desc: An unemployed writer gets a job for an industrialist and is sent on a business trip to Prague. However, he does not realise his boss is actually in the British Secret Service and is using him to unwittingly carry out an important mission - while his local chauffeur is really a Communist agent. Spy comedy, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylva Koscina, Robert Morley, Leo McKern and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series presented by Andrew White, featuring inspirational walks between 2-8 miles from around Britain

programme.title: Walks Around Britain

programme.title: Opening Up the Soane
programme.desc: Documentary about the extensive refurbishment of Sir John Soane's Museum to restore the building to its original glory

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Britain stood alone in 1940 facing the might of the all-conquering German forces but Winston Churchill had an idea. He set up an Underground Army of farmers teenagers women and veterans from WW1

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The armoured divisions visit Canada for a mock battle, in which conditions are exactly as expected during a war - except lasers are used instead of live ammunition. Back in London, the trainee troopers don their breastplates as the ceremonial season begins, and prepare to guard the Queen for the first time

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Callan

programme.title: Bright Young Things (2003)
programme.desc: A would-be writer tries to raise enough money to marry his sweetheart, but a lost manuscript and several unlucky bets put his goal out of reach. Desperate to turn matters round, he launches himself into 1930s high society, hoping to curry favour with the rich and influential. Comedy based on Evelyn Waugh's Vile Bodies, directed by Stephen Fry and starring Emily Mortimer, Stephen Campbell Moore, James McAvoy and Michael Sheen

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith (1978)
programme.desc: An Australian farmhand of half-Aboriginal descent tries to get by in the face of cruelty and prejudice. A betrayal by his white employers tips him over the edge, and he embarks on a campaign of violent revenge for all the injustices he has endured. Historical drama, starring Tommy Lewis and Freddy Reynolds

programme.title: Caravaggio (1986)
programme.desc: The Renaissance artist lies on his deathbed and remembers his tumultuous life. As his revolutionary approach to religious art raises controversy in the Catholic Church, the painter becomes infatuated with a married brawler, leading to a destructive love triangle. Derek Jarman's biopic, starring Nigel Terry, Sean Bean, Michael Gough and Tilda Swinton in her movie debut

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at New Orleans Saints' 2009 Super Bowl triumph over Indianapolis Colts at the Sun Life Stadium in Miami, Florida. Despite trailing 10-6 at the half-time interval, the Saints rallied in the second half to secure a 31-17 victory, claiming their first Super Bowl title in the process

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Green Bay Packers' 2010 Super Bowl success over Pittsburgh Steelers at the Cowboys Stadium in Arlington, Texas. This was the Packers' fourth overall win in the NFL's showpiece encounter, and their second since Super Bowl II under celebrated head coach Vince Lombardi, after whom the Super Bowl trophy is now named
